_meta.author: easemize
_meta.title: Glass Testimonial swiper
_meta.description:
Interactive 3D Testimonial Stack Component for React - A premium, drag-enabled testimonial carousel featuring stacked card animations, glass morphism effects, and smooth transitions. This React TypeScript component displays customer reviews in an engaging 3D stack layout with touch/mouse drag navigation, automatic pagination dots, and responsive design. Perfect for showcasing client feedback, user reviews, product testimonials, and social proof on modern web applications.
Key Features:

Interactive Drag Navigation - Users can swipe/drag cards for intuitive navigation
3D Stacked Animation - Cards stack behind the active testimonial with scaling and opacity effects
Glass Morphism Design - Modern frosted glass aesthetic with backdrop blur effects
Responsive Layout - Mobile-first design that adapts to all screen sizes
TypeScript Support - Fully typed interfaces for better developer experience
Customizable Styling - Avatar gradients, tags, stats, and color schemes
Accessible Controls - ARIA labels and keyboard navigation support
Performance Optimized - Efficient rendering with useCallback and ref management
